zh.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy是Baron Henry de Tracy的女兒，於1196年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。她於1223年與Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres在英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1273年在她的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy was born in 1196, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Baron Henry de Tracy. She married Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres in 1223, in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1273, in her hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy est née en 1196, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Baron Henry de Tracy. Elle a épousé Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres en 1223, à Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy wurde 1196 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Baron Henry de Tracy geboren. ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracyは1196年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでBaron Henry de Tracyの娘として生まれた。1223年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクでThomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1273年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy(은)는 1196년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Baron Henry de Tracy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크에서 Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy nasceu em 1196, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Baron Henry de Tracy. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres em 1223, em Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy родилась в 1196 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Baron Henry de Tracy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres в 1223 г. в местности бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1273 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eva de Tracy nació en 1196, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Baron Henry de Tracy. Se casó con Thomas de Lord Kidwillyin Londres en 1223, en Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1273, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
